addPreviewerHint: Enter the React component name for the new previewer. The component must be registered in VIEWER_COMPONENTS in viewerRegistry.jsx.
componentNotRegistered: Component not yet registered in viewerRegistry
description: Previewers display content side-by-side with the agent chat. Previewers optimize the usability for use cases with special requirements for filetypes (e.g. CAD viewers).
duplicateViewer: A previewer with this name already exists
mcpUIHint: Renders file content via an MCP server group registered in the backend. The server receives the file content through a tool call and returns an interactive UI.
noComponent: No viewer component registered in viewerRegistry
selectPreviewer: Select a previewer from the list
serviceHint: Activated by a running service, not by file extension. Triggered via sidebar icons.
systemLevelNote: These are system-level settings. Project-level overrides can be configured in Customize UI.
title: Previewers Manager
